calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-037 consumer-cascade behavioural validation (PFC/BLA/CeA/beta-gate consumers + SalienceCoordinator enable + PAG-engaging env reuse; supersedes 483d substrate-ceiling FAIL)
items.note: Behavioural-validation successor to V3-EXQ-483d (run_id v3_exq_483d_sd037_broadcast_gap4_override_signal_20260529T220132Z_v3, FAIL substrate-ceiling 2026-05-29). 483d autopsy at REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-483d_2026-05-30.{md,json} routed to implement-substrate amend SD-037 (consumer-cascade work). Amend session (TASK_CLAIMS implement-substrate-sd037-consumer-cascade-20260530T071523Z) landed 2026-05-30 with four new REEConfig gains (override_pfc_eta_gain / override_bla_encoding_gain / override_cea_amplitude_gain / override_beta_interrupt_gain; all default 0.0 = bit-identical OFF) wiring override_signal into the four additional consumer sites named in MECH-281 implementation_note: LateralPFCAnalog SD-033a, BLAAnalog SD-035, CeAAnalog SD-035, BetaGate urgency_interrupt path MECH-090. 556/556 contracts + 7/7 preflight PASS with gains at default. Activation smoke 2026-05-30: BLA encoding_gain 2.5 -> 5.0, CeA mode_prior 0.2 -> 0.4, LateralPFC rule_state delta 0.0956 -> 0.2867 at override_signal=1.0. ree-v3/CLAUDE.md SD-037 consumer-cascade section + claims.yaml SD-037/MECH-280/MECH-281 implementation_note appends + this queue entry all landed in the same session. 4-arm factorial OFF_OFF / ON_OFF / OFF_ON / ON_ON: ARM_0 has gains>0 but override_recruitment_threshold=10.0 pinning override at 0 (no-recruitment baseline); ARM_1 SD-037 master OFF (no-SD-037 baseline); ARM_2 master ON + gains=0 (483d wired-but-inert reproduction); ARM_3 master ON + all gains>0 (cascade engaged). All four arms share use_salience_coordinator=True + use_gabaergic_decay=True + use_pag_freeze_gate=True (SD-036+MECH-279 PAG-engaging env per autopsy section 8; same V3-EXQ-475-style substrate) + use_lateral_pfc_analog=True + use_amygdala_analog=True + use_bla_analog=True + use_cea_analog=True + use_dacc=True. Acceptance: C1 substrate-readiness + C2 cascade-engagement (lateral_pfc rule_state delta >=1.5x, bla encoding_gain >=1.3x, cea mode_prior >=1.3x ARM_3 vs ARM_2 on >=2/3 seeds) + C3 PRIMARY goal_norm_peak lift ARM_3 - ARM_0 across 3/3 seeds (vs 1/3 on 483d) + C4 action_counts TV divergence ARM_3 vs ARM_2 >=0.05 on >=2/3 seeds. Interpretation grid in script docstring. Dry-run 2026-05-30T08:34Z ran 3 of 4 arms to completion (verdict prints firing, no crashes) before manual abort to save runtime; per-arm config-propagation smoke 4/4 PASS confirming all four arms instantiate broadcast_override + salience + lateral_pfc + bla + cea modules with expected gain values.

items.title: MECH-341 GAP-B Phase P3 behavioural falsifier B_only/ablate_B/ALL_ON (re-queue of 614 post manifest-pipeline silent-drop fix)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-614 (queued 2026-05-29T17:00Z, ree-v3 commit 62c45e9). Coordinator DB marks V3-EXQ-614 status=completed at 2026-05-29T19:13:19Z (updated_at; claimed_by_machine=None, claimed_at=None for that row); results table has zero rows for V3-EXQ-614 and no manifest landed under REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/. Third member of the 2026-05-30 manifest-pipeline silent-drop cluster alongside V3-EXQ-490h -> 490i + V3-EXQ-592b -> 592c (cluster autopsy at REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490h-V3-EXQ-592b_2026-05-30.md, amended this session with V3-EXQ-614 absorption). Runner-side fix at ree-v3 commit 41c3411 'runner: fix V3-EXQ-592b FAIL/ERROR silent-drop' landed AFTER V3-EXQ-614 had already vanished, so the bug is fixed and 614a runs against the new runner. Bit-identical script body to V3-EXQ-614; only EXPERIMENT_TYPE / QUEUE_ID / SUPERSEDES constants + docstring header change. claim_ids unchanged (MECH-341 + ARC-065) -- the science is identical; only the pipeline bug was the difference. Priority 320 (above V3-EXQ-569c GAP-A re-queue prio 300 + V3-EXQ-490i Tier-1 retest prio 250) because GAP-B is load-bearing for MECH-341 promotion and 614a is the gate. Smoke-tested 2026-05-30T06:41Z dry-run 3/3 arms PASSed. Closes behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md GAP-B at the behavioural-validation layer on PASS.

items.title: SD-056 action-contrastive matched-entropy FP-2 falsifier (GAP-A, A_only; re-queue of 569b)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-569b which never actually executed. cloud-4 claimed 569b at 2026-05-29T21:11:24Z; ~65 seconds later cloud-4's ree-runner.service was systemctl-restarted (to pick up the new PHASE3_DISABLE_RUNNER_HEARTBEAT_WRITE=1 env var). systemd's cgroup-kill SIGTERM'd the experiment subprocess; Python exit 143; no sentinel; runner's ERROR-result branch removed 569b from queue and POST /queue/remove'd it. No manifest, no governance evidence. 569c is bit-identical: same script body (observation-anchored InfoNCE targets via rolling buffer, grad-clip 1.0, non-finite-loss skip), same 5 arms (ARM_0_OFF / ARM_1_W001 / ARM_2_W005 / ARM_3_W020 / ARM_4_MATCHED_NOISE), same acceptance criteria (C1 cand_world_pairwise_dist>0.05, C2 candidate first-action entropy>matched-noise, C3 selected-action entropy lift). claim_ids unchanged. New ID avoids the silent-skip-by-completed-list pattern on whatever worker still has 569b in its persisted runner_status.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion discriminative pair (env-curriculum; supersedes 517b substrate-ceiling FAIL)
items.note: Discriminative-pair retest for MECH-302 SufferingDerivativeComparator on env-curriculum substrate. Predecessor V3-EXQ-517b FAILed substrate_ceiling (3rd of 3 attempts in the 517 / 517a / 517b series; failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-517b_2026-05-30.{md,json} ruled out parameter tuning: 517a 0.33 events/seed -> 517b 0.00 events/seed across the 150 -> 300 steps/episode extension; trained avoidance policy filters out hazard-contact -> heal trajectories the comparator needs). Substrate amend landed 2026-05-30 (TASK_CLAIMS implement-substrate-mech302-scheduled-limb-damage-curriculum): SD-022 extension scheduled_limb_damage_* env kwargs (env-only, NOT surfaced through REEConfig.from_dims; matches SD-022/023/029/047/048/049/054 precedent). Pure env-side curriculum: every scheduled_limb_damage_interval steps, with probability scheduled_limb_damage_prob, adds scheduled_limb_damage_magnitude to one (or all) limbs in self.limb_damage independent of agent action or hazard contact. Distinct from SD-029 scheduled_external_hazard (which relocates a hazard but still depends on agent contact). 565/565 contracts + 7/7 preflight PASS with master OFF (regression-clean, was 556 + 9 new MECH-302-curriculum contracts in tests/contracts/test_scheduled_limb_damage_curriculum.py). Bit-identical OFF guarantee verified. Activation smoke: 5 fires in 67 steps at interval=10/prob=1.0; magnitude correctly applied with [0, 1] clamp; per-episode counter reset PASSes; random + all limb_selection modes both PASS; preconditions (master requires limb_damage_enabled + bad limb_selection raises) PASS. Curriculum: interval=50 / prob=0.5 / magnitude=0.4 / limb_selection=random (~3 injections per 300-step episode -> ~120 damage events per seed in P1). Curriculum is identical in both arms; only use_suffering_derivative_comparator and valence_liking_enabled differ. Acceptance criteria unchanged from 517a/517b: C1 ARM_A events >= 3/seed, C2 ARM_A writes >= 2/seed, C3 ARM_B events == 0, C4 ARM_B writes == 0; PASS_FRACTION_REQUIRED=2/3. Comparator parameters unchanged (window=30, threshold=0.005, min_initial_norm=0.01). Dry-run 2026-05-30 ran 3 P0 episodes per arm without error (P1 not reached in dry-run mode; counter shows 0 by design). claims.yaml MECH-302 evidence_quality_note extended; substrate_queue MECH-302 entry amended with failure_record + implementation_log per autopsy recommendation. PASS clears MECH-302 v3_pending gate AND lifts gate (c) for the MECH-304 conditioned-inhibition experiment.

Bit-identical script body; only the EXPERIMENT_TYPE / QUEUE_ID / SUPERSEDES constants and docstring change. The runner restart-induced REE_assembly git pull cycle clobbered the untracked manifest before it was pushed. See autopsy artifact REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490h-V3-EXQ-592b_2026-05-30.md. claim_ids unchanged from predecessor -- the science is identical; only the pipeline bug was the difference.
